title: TypeScriptCodeGenerationConfig
description: V2 configuration for TypeScript code generation (Light mode only). Produces entity definitions, form typings, OptionSet constants, SDK message name constants, and Custom API wrappers.

namespace.description: Reserved for future TypeScript module prefix. Not currently used by the generator.

language.description: LCID for label localization. null = org base language.

entities.description: Entity scope — defines which entities to include via additive mechanisms.

fromSolutions.description: Solution unique names. All entities in these solutions are added to the scope.

mask.description: Wildcard pattern (e.g. 'contoso_*') to auto-include matching entities.

requests.description: SDK message names (actions, custom APIs, built-in messages). Presence generates SDK message name constants. Entries with parameters also produce Custom API typed wrappers when output.customApis is true.

optionSets.description: Global OptionSet logical names to generate as standalone constants.

forms.description: Form generation configuration. Omit to generate all forms for all scoped entities.

filter.description: Explicit form allowlist (format: 'entity.formname.form'). Empty = all forms.

fromSolutions.description: Only generate forms belonging to the solutions in the entity scope.

testHelpers.description: Generate XrmMock test helper files alongside form files. Opt-in.

customApis.description: Generate typed Custom API wrappers for requests that have parameters.
